expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves donut-label assumptions for label visibility, density limits, and overlap-sensitive presentation
expectations.evidence: In result.md, Section 3 is explicitly titled “Context Intake: Donut Label Assumptions to Preserve (Explicit Case Focus)” and breaks the focus into “A. Label visibility assumptions”, “B. Density limits assumptions”, and “C. Overlap-sensitive presentation assumptions”, detailing each.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The output is labeled “QA Plan Orchestrator — Phase 1 (Context Intake)”. It captures goals, constraints, and clarifying questions (Sections 1–5) and states it is “Blocked pending customer-issue evidence content,” and it does not provide downstream test cases/execution, consistent with Phase 1 context intake.
